raw_consumer_statement: I closed my Barclays Mastercard Account in XXXX of XXXX. In XXXX of XXXX, in accordance with the autopayment the account was paid in full. I sold my home associated with the billing address in XXXX of XXXX. 3 1/2 year later, a charge from XXXX XXXX appeared on or around XX/XX/XXXX, for {$20.00}. I did not authorize this charge as the account had been closed for 3 1/2 years. Bills were sent to the address associated with the closed account. After 6 months, Barclays charged off the card and show my credit as the fault. This is fraud. I contacted Barclays about this when I viewed my credit report in XX/XX/XXXX. They saw the discrepancy and asked me to submit information in writing. I did. They have taken no action and this is fraud and is unfairly hurting my credit rating. The account in question is XXXX. XXXX recommended I report this to you. I am also going to file a police report.
